Article.ArticleTitle: Catheter-related bloodstream infections in hemodialysis: microbiology, antimicrobial resistance, complications and predictors of mortality.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Infectious Diseases and Clinical Microbiology, Haydarpaşa Numune Training and Research Hospital, Tıbbiye Street, No:23, Üsküdar, Istanbul, Türkiye. ezgizemsoylu@gmail.com.
Department of Infectious Diseases and Clinical Microbiology, Etlik City Hospital, Ankara, Türkiye.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethical approval: The study was approved by the Ankara Etlik City Hospital Clinical Research Ethics Committee (Approval no: AEŞH-EK1-2023-096, approval date: 03/05/2023) and conducted in accordance with the principles of the Declaration of Helsinki. Consent to participate: As this study was designed as a retrospective analysis using anonymized patient data, the requirement for informed consent to participate was waived by the institutional ethics committee. Consent for publication: N/A. Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests.
